---
title: 'Handmade Bags: Lord of the Rings (Medium Handbag)'
date: '2017-11-28T06:35:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Creatively Unique Arts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2587292256372670450'
blogger_filename: '/2017/11/handmade-bags-lord-of-rings-medium.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatively Unique Arts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Bags'
---

Here we have a Lord of the Rings bag, with the theme proudly displayed on the front flap. There are two hidden pockets inside as well.<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144104980-46b8652ea515.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144104980-7d1edf24db77.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lord-of-the-rings-bag-large-64afd218bed3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lord-of-the-rings-bag-large-5c330e16d910.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144344446-b9ee7e48cca1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144344446-9621606a52a3.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144400583-8eb38c540742.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144400583-224b00cc11cc.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
